description_long: This is a modern, expansive house with a flat roof and a mix of glass, concrete, and wood exterior finishes. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, multiple terraces, and a spacious open-plan layout visible from above. The property is surrounded by a low wall and lush landscaping, including several mature trees and manicured shrubs. There is a prominent driveway leading to a covered garage area, and the backyard includes a patio space for outdoor living. The house is designed with clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a strong emphasis on indoor-outdoor connectivity. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on natural light and open spaces.
description: A large, modern house with flat roofs, extensive glass windows, and landscaped surroundings. Features include open terraces, a driveway, and a mix of concrete, wood, and glass materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, lush landscaping, and a clear view of the terraces and large windows.
description_view_1: Driveway and garage are prominent, with the rear patio and open backyard visible.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the rear facade, additional windows, and the boundary wall with dense greenery.
description_view_3: Side view showing the open-plan layout, side terrace, and more of the garden and wall perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, modern door with a minimal overhang, flanked by large glass panels and surrounded by landscaped greenery.
